personalInfo.name: Abhijeet Kakade
personalInfo.powerLine: Building Scalable Interfaces at the Intersection of AI & Web3

about.headline: Web3 Pioneer Stuns World With Autonomous Agent Breakthrough
about.deck: Abhijeet Kakade, an intern at AI Alpha Tech, bridges the gap between AI and Blockchain with winning hackathon entries.
about.byline: By Our Digital Correspondent · Nashik Bureau
body: Abhijeet Kakade is a Web3 and frontend developer specializing in React, AI agents, and scalable UI systems. Sources close to the development community confirmed late Tuesday that Kakade has assembled a portfolio of work so impressive that senior colleagues were left temporarily speechless.
Specializing in autonomous agents and gasless Web3 experiences, Kakade has already made waves with 'OnlyPngs', a hackathon-winning project that leverages Account Abstraction and LLMs.
My mission is to simplify complex blockchain interactions using natural language.

projects.title: EventPin
projects.impact: Full-stack modernization for a high-traffic event management SaaS.
projects.description: Architected a new frontend UI with React and expanded backend capabilities including complex recurring events, vendor management, and selection-based Stripe integrations.
features: Payment Selection: Dynamically configured Stripe gateway selections for diverse event models.
Recurring Logic: Engineered robust backend services for recurring event scheduling.
Database Architecture: Managed high-performance MariaDB environments for event scaling.
Client Deployment: Handled end-to-end deployment cycles and direct client technical dealing.

projects.title: ChairmansSaheb
projects.impact: Architected the primary payment flow for an early-stage startup's first product.
projects.description: Developed the core transaction architecture and frontend experience for a high-potential FinTech startup.
features: Primary Payment Layer: Engineered the initial secure connection logic for product transactions.
Full-Stack Integration: Seamlessly bridged Next.js frontend with Node/MongoDB backend.
Product Zero: Played a critical role in launching the startup's very first market offering.

projects.title: Tranpoline
projects.impact: Engineered the official brand portal with modern App Router performance.
projects.description: Developed the official corporate website with a focus on SEO, high-speed routing, and brand fidelity.
features: App Router Architecture: Leveraged the latest Next.js patterns for optimal routing.
UI Fidelity: Translated complex brand designs into a performant, accessible web experience.

projects.title: AVAXVERSE
projects.techStack: Next.js (React 19), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Solidity, Avalanche, Wagmi
projects.impact: High-fidelity DID & Reputation System for 10k+ potential nodes.
projects.description: A decentralized super app and trust protocol for the Avalanche ecosystem, revolutionizing the freelance economy with trustless identity and reputation systems.
features: Identity Registry (DID): Decentralized ID system for verifiable user profiles.
Reputation Token (SBT): Soulbound Tokens representing immutable user credibility.
Escrow Protocol: Secure, trustless payments for decentralized freelance services.
Professional Court: Community-driven juror system for resolving on-chain disputes.
Reputation-Weighted Voting: Governance power scaled by contribution and credibility.

projects.title: OnlyPngs
projects.impact: Winner of 2:47PM Studio Hackathon — Pioneer in gasless Agent UX.
projects.description: An AI-powered, non-custodial NFT trading platform enabling automated, gasless transactions. Winner of 2:47PM Studio Hackathon.
features: The Sleeping Buy: Autonomous monitoring system that executes trades based on price alerts while offline.
Gasless UI/UX: Completely gas-free experience via 0xgasless Paymaster-funded transactions.
Natural Language Interface: Uses Gemini 2.0 to translate human intent into on-chain actions.
Security First: Architected using Smart Accounts and session keys for non-custodial control.

projects.title: Fuji
projects.impact: Optimized LLM-Insight engine with [ACTIONABLE] signal processing.
projects.description: A specialized AI Insight Engine designed as an intelligence layer for autonomous coding agents.
features: Built for Agents: Generates insights in TOON format (optimized for LLMs) with [ACTIONABLE] tags.
5-Stage Pipeline: Static, Symbol, Diff Isolation, AI-Critic, and Supervise stages for thorough analysis.
Kyoto Night Aesthetic: Custom terminal theme with Sakura Pink, Matcha Green, and Wisteria Purple.

projects.title: Kimiko (キミコ)
projects.impact: Advanced FHE privacy layer for compliance-grade Solana audits.
projects.description: High-end wallet analysis engine and compliance toolkit for Solana focusing on 'Selective Visibility'.
features: Privacy Scoring: Quantifies on-chain traceability and detects leakage vectors.
Inco Shield (FHE): Uses Fully Homomorphic Encryption for trustless, encrypted identity attestations.
Behavioral Compliance: Verifies users based on historical behavior rather than traditional KYC.
Zen Interface: Tactical 'Digital Zen' HUD for human-readable risk assessments.

projects.title: YAMI (闇)
projects.impact: Backendless Shadow-Ledger implementation with XOR masking.
projects.description: Premium, backendless privacy layer for the Solana ecosystem featuring confidential transfers.
features: Confidential Transfers: Native Token-2022 extensions for encrypted balances.
ShadowWire Integration: High-fidelity ZK experience simulating internal 'Shadow Ledger' states.
LocalStorage Obfuscation: XOR-based masking to secure sensitive history locally without a backend.
Real-time Auditing: Integrated health monitoring for Solana Devnet nodes.

projects.title: CodeNap
projects.impact: Published on Chrome Web Store — Focus on Dev Well-being.
projects.description: Productivity extension that provides mindful reminders to take breaks, stand up, and hydrate.
features: Mindful Reminders: Customizable alerts for health breaks.
Stand Up & Hydrate: Specialized modes for physical well-being during coding.
Adobe Firefly Assets: High-quality, AI-generated visual design.

projects.title: Quick-Scroll
projects.impact: Navigational utility with 200+ Active Users and sub-0.1ms latency.
projects.description: Navigation tool allowing users to scroll to top (single click) or bottom (double click) instantly.
features: Single-Click Top: Instant navigation to the start of long pages.
Double-Click Bottom: Quick leap to the footer/end of content.
Lightweight: Minimal footprint for lightning-fast performance.

projects.title: GCOERC Cosa Website
projects.impact: Serving 500+ students with optimized campus accessibility.
projects.description: Official website for the Guru Gobind Singh College Of Engineering Computer Engineering Student Association (COSA).
features: Association Portal: Central hub for COSA events and student resources.
Rich Media: Visual documentation of association activities.
Performance Optimized: Built for accessibility across the campus network.

projects.title: Previous Portfolio
projects.impact: Advanced GSAP storytelling with 60FPS motion performance.
projects.description: Personal portfolio demonstrating mobile and web development skills with advanced animations.
features: GSAP Animations: High-fidelity motion design across all sections.
Mobile First: Completely responsive design for every viewport.
Interactive Storytelling: Engaging user journey through developer history.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer (Intern) — AI Alpha Tech
experience.desc: 6-month full-stack tenure delivering high-performance UI and backend solutions for industrial SaaS and FinTech platforms.
details: Contributed for 6 months as a full-stack developer on SaaS and FinTech platforms.
Engineered the new React frontend for EventPin and expanded backend services for venues, vendors, and recurring events.
Architected the official Tranpoline brand portal with Next.js and the initial payment architecture for ChairmansSaheb using Next.js, Node.js, and MongoDB.

internshipProjects.title: EventPin
work: Architected a new frontend UI with React for an industrial-grade event management SaaS.
Engineered backend features for high-performance venue and vendor management.
Implemented complex recurring event logic and selection-based Stripe gateway integrations.
Managed MariaDB SQL database environments and oversaw technical client dealing and deployments.

internshipProjects.title: Tranpoline
work: Developed major components of the official brand portal using the latest Next.js patterns.
Leveraged the App Router for optimal routing performance and SEO fidelity.
Translated complex brand requirements into an accessible, high-performance web experience.

internshipProjects.title: ChairmansSaheb
work: Architected the primary payment orchestration layer for an early-stage startup's flagship product.
Seamlessly integrated a Next.js frontend with a Node.js and MongoDB backend.
Engineered the initial secure connection logic for product transactions.

experience.title: Independent Technical Consultant
experience.desc: Consulting on high-performance React architectures, SEO, and full-stack solutions for diverse clients.

experience.title: Computer Engineering — GCOERC
experience.desc: Studying at GCOERC, focusing on advanced algorithm design, decentralised systems, and high-impact software engineering.

publications.description: Abhijeet maintains a regular cadence of technical dispatches, exploring the intersection of modern web architectures and decentralised systems.

recentDispatches.title: The Case of the Clogged Backend
recentDispatches.insight: A slow React frontend mystery solved: Why sometimes the UI isn't slow, it's just waiting for the backend to breathe.

recentDispatches.title: Automation Without Guardrails
recentDispatches.insight: 39 deployment loops and one major realization: Why even AI-powered 'vibe coding' requires rigorous structure and CI/CD.

recentDispatches.title: The Paradox of the Local Machine
recentDispatches.insight: Investigating why code that 'works on my machine' fails in dev—and the devious database schema differences behind it.

photography.title: Sunday Supplement: Light & Shadow
photography.subtitle: A collection of moments captured via mobile lens

quotes.text: The best way to predict the future of Web3 is to build the agents that will navigate it.
quotes.author: Abhijeet Kakade
